steps.title: Set the numerator to zero
steps.content:
The fractions have the same numerator, $x-14$, but different denominators. They can be equal only if the shared numerator is $0$.
$$x-14=0$$

steps.title: Find the requested value
steps.content:
Solve for $x$, then compute the expression the question asks for.
$$x=14$$
$$x+14=28$$
The answer is D.
